meta.title: CrossFit AI agent training program
meta.design_goal: Generate daily CrossFit plans that preserve intended stimulus, mechanics-consistency-intensity progression, structured variance, and practical scaling for Chinese and English users.
evidence_basis: Official CrossFit methodology: constantly varied functional movements performed at high intensity
CrossFit Level 1 concepts: mechanics, consistency, intensity; broad, general, inclusive fitness
Programming template concepts: variation across monostructural, gymnastics, and weightlifting domains plus time domains
Xiaohongshu creator-note themes: Scale path, movement economy, breathing, non-random variance, limiter diagnosis, and effective accessory work
Public professional and athlete video sources for movement context and competition pacing
safety: This is training guidance, not medical advice.
Pain that changes mechanics, acute injury, chest pain, fainting, neurological symptoms, or unusual shortness of breath overrides the plan.
New athletes should learn mechanics and consistency before chasing intensity.
Avoid increasing skill difficulty, load, speed, and volume in the same week.
High-skill gymnastics and Olympic lifts should be coached or scaled when technique is uncertain.

beginner.label: Beginner foundation
beginner.best_for: New CrossFit athletes, home trainees, return-from-break athletes, and people still learning basic mechanics.
entry_checks: Can brisk walk or bike for 20-30 minutes
Can squat, hinge, press, plank, and carry light load without pain
Can keep breathing controlled during low-skill circuits
beginner.success_target: Understand class flow, scale every workout correctly, and finish sessions with clean mechanics.

recreational.label: Recreational affiliate athlete
recreational.best_for: Regular affiliate members or general fitness athletes who can train most weeks.
entry_checks: Can complete 4 weekly sessions for 4 weeks
Can perform common dumbbell, kettlebell, rowing, running, and basic gymnastics substitutions
Understands RPE and can stop before technical breakdown
recreational.success_target: Improve broad fitness while keeping weekly training repeatable and recoverable.

competitive.label: Open and local competition prep
competitive.best_for: Experienced CrossFit athletes preparing for the Open, local competitions, or Rx benchmarks.
entry_checks: Can tolerate two to three quality sessions weekly
Can scale advanced gymnastics and Olympic lifts intelligently
competitive.success_target: Preserve intended stimulus across Rx and scaled choices, improve limiter-specific skills, and benchmark reliably.

advanced.label: Advanced competitive pathway
advanced.best_for: High-skill athletes with coach oversight, competition goals, and recovery tracking.
entry_checks: Can recover from high-skill and heavy days
Has coach or experienced reviewer for technical movements
Has benchmarks for strength, gymnastics, engine, and mixed-modal pacing
advanced.success_target: Raise limiter ceilings while keeping movement economy and recovery trend stable.

foundation.label: Foundation
foundation.purpose: Build mechanics, consistency, easy engine capacity, and a reliable Scale habit before adding intensity.
foundation.progression: Most work is submaximal. Every mixed-modal day includes a defined stimulus and a scaling choice.

build.label: Build
build.purpose: Add strength skill, gymnastics density, weightlifting technique, and controlled intensity across time domains.
build.progression: Two to three quality days weekly, with one limiter-focused accessory block.

integration.label: Integration
integration.purpose: Blend strength, skill, and conditioning under fatigue while preserving movement economy and pacing.
integration.progression: Use benchmark-style formats and repeat split targets without turning every day into a test.

benchmark.label: Benchmark and deload
benchmark.purpose: Sharpen, test selected benchmarks, and reduce fatigue so progress is measurable.
benchmark.progression: Reduce volume 25-45 percent while keeping short intensity touches and skill standards.

warmup.en: 5 min nasal breathing walk, bike, or easy row
warmup.zh: 5 分钟鼻呼吸步行、骑车或轻松划船
活动脚踝、髋、胸椎和手腕

skill_strength.en: 10 min air squat, hinge, push-up, ring-row or band-row mechanics
skill_strength.zh: 10 分钟徒手深蹲、髋铰链、俯卧撑、吊环划船或弹力带划船机制练习

metcon.en: 20-35 min conversational bike, row, jog, or mixed easy aerobic
metcon.zh: 20-35 分钟可对话强度骑车、划船、慢跑或混合轻松有氧

cooldown.en: Record soreness, sleep, and the first position that felt limited
cooldown.zh: 记录酸痛、睡眠和第一个感觉受限的位置

intended_stimulus.en: Finish fresher, not destroyed; today restores mechanics and aerobic rhythm.
intended_stimulus.zh: 结束时应更清爽，不是被榨干；今天恢复动作机制和有氧节奏。

scaling_path.en: Use bike or walk if running changes gait.
scaling_path.zh: 如果跑步改变步态，改用骑车或步行。

scaling_path.en: Keep all reps strict and slow enough to explain out loud.
scaling_path.zh: 所有动作保持严格，速度慢到可以边做边说清楚。

notes.en: Do not turn recovery into a conditioning test.
notes.zh: 不要把恢复课做成体能测试。

notes.en: This day follows the movement-economy theme from the Chinese creator-note review.
notes.zh: 本课对应中文笔记中的动作经济性主题。

warmup.en: 2 rounds: 8 air squats, 8 band rows, 8 scap push-ups
warmup.zh: 2 轮：8 次徒手深蹲、8 次弹力带划船、8 次肩胛俯卧撑

skill_strength.en: Back squat or goblet squat 4 x 5 at technical load
skill_strength.zh: 背蹲或高脚杯深蹲 4 组 x 5 次，使用技术重量

skill_strength.en: Strict press or dumbbell press 3 x 8
skill_strength.zh: 严格推举或哑铃推举 3 组 x 8 次

metcon.en: 8 min EMOM: odd min 8 ring rows, even min 10 box step-ups
metcon.zh: 8 分钟 EMOM：奇数分钟 8 次吊环划船，偶数分钟 10 次箱上踏步

cooldown.zh: 背阔肌、胸肌、髋屈肌活动度

intended_stimulus.en: Quality strength practice plus low-panic breathing.
intended_stimulus.zh: 高质量力量练习，加上不失控的呼吸刺激。

scaling_path.en: Reduce load before cutting range of motion.
scaling_path.zh: 先降重量，再考虑缩短动作幅度。

scaling_path.en: Use band rows or elevated rows if pulling mechanics break.
scaling_path.zh: 拉力动作变形时，使用弹力带划船或升高角度划船。

notes.en: Mechanics and consistency come before intensity.
notes.zh: 动作机制和稳定性优先于强度。

wednesday.title: Strength skill plus short mixed-modal workout

warmup.en: 3 rounds smooth: 6 deadlifts with empty bar, 6 inchworms, 8 sit-ups
warmup.zh: 顺畅完成 3 轮：空杆硬拉 6 次、毛毛虫爬行 6 次、仰卧起坐 8 次

skill_strength.en: Deadlift 5 x 3 at RPE 5-6, resetting every rep
skill_strength.zh: 硬拉 5 组 x 3 次，RPE 5-6，每次重新建立起始位

skill_strength.en: 10 min skill: kipping swing positions or strict hollow/arch drill
skill_strength.zh: 10 分钟技能：摆动引体位置练习，或严格 hollow/arch 练习

metcon.en: 10 min AMRAP: 8 kettlebell deadlifts, 8 push-ups, 10 cal row
metcon.zh: 10 分钟 AMRAP：8 次壶铃硬拉、8 次俯卧撑、10 卡划船

cooldown.en: Write the first movement that forced you to slow down
cooldown.zh: 记录第一个让你不得不降速的动作

intended_stimulus.en: Short mixed-modal density with clean hinge mechanics and controlled breathing.
intended_stimulus.zh: 短时间混合模式密度训练，保持干净髋铰链和可控呼吸。

scaling_path.en: Scale push-ups to elevated hands before reps turn into singles.
scaling_path.zh: 俯卧撑变成单次挣扎前，先改为手撑高位。

scaling_path.en: Keep the row smooth; damper higher is not automatically stronger.
scaling_path.zh: 划船保持顺畅；风阻更高不等于更强。

scaling_path.en: Preserve 3-4 rounds of steady work rather than chasing Rx load.
scaling_path.zh: 优先保留 3-4 轮稳定输出，而不是追求 Rx 重量。

notes.en: This session implements the Scale-path and deadlift-start-position themes from the Chinese note review.
notes.zh: 本课落实中文笔记中的 Scale 路径和硬拉起始位主题。

warmup.en: 8 min easy bike, row, or jog
warmup.zh: 8 分钟轻松骑车、划船或慢跑
3 组 20 秒放松节奏提升

skill_strength.en: Breathing drill: 4 x 2 min nasal or controlled exhale effort
skill_strength.zh: 呼吸练习：4 组 2 分钟鼻呼吸或控制呼气输出

metcon.en: 6-10 x 2 min steady / 1 min easy on rower, bike, ski, or run
metcon.zh: 划船、骑车、滑雪机或跑步 6-10 组：2 分钟稳定输出 / 1 分钟轻松恢复

cooldown.en: 5 min easy walk and note split drift
cooldown.zh: 5 分钟轻松步行，并记录分段漂移

intended_stimulus.en: Repeatable engine work where the final rep looks like the first.
intended_stimulus.zh: 可重复的心肺训练，最后一组应看起来像第一组。

scaling_path.en: Shorten each interval to 90 sec if breathing becomes panicked.
scaling_path.zh: 如果呼吸失控，将每组缩短到 90 秒。

scaling_path.en: Choose one machine and keep technique quiet.
scaling_path.zh: 选择一个器械并保持技术稳定安静。

notes.en: Breathing is a performance signal, not decoration.
notes.zh: 呼吸是表现信号，不是装饰。

friday.title: Rest or mobility plus skill review

skill_strength.en: Optional 10 min positional review: squat bottom, overhead lockout, hollow body
skill_strength.zh: 可选 10 分钟位置复盘：深蹲底部、过顶锁定、hollow body

metcon.en: No conditioning today
metcon.zh: 今天不做体能刺激

intended_stimulus.en: Absorb training and protect the weekend mixed-modal session.
intended_stimulus.zh: 吸收训练，并保护周末混合模式训练质量。

scaling_path.en: If soreness is above 6/10, make it full rest.
scaling_path.zh: 如果酸痛超过 6/10，改为完全休息。

notes.en: More training volume is not automatically more progress.
notes.zh: 更多训练量不自动等于更多进步。

warmup.en: 8 min general warm-up plus movement-specific rehearsal
warmup.zh: 8 分钟通用热身，加当天动作专项预演

skill_strength.en: 12 min skill: wall-ball mechanics or medicine-ball clean progression
skill_strength.zh: 12 分钟技能：墙球机制或药球翻站进阶

metcon.en: 3 rounds for quality: 400 m run or 500 m row, 15 wall balls or med-ball squats, 12 ring rows
metcon.zh: 高质量完成 3 轮：400 米跑或 500 米划船、15 次墙球或药球深蹲、12 次吊环划船

cooldown.en: Walk until breathing normalizes, then calves and lats
cooldown.zh: 步行到呼吸恢复正常，然后放松小腿和背阔肌

intended_stimulus.en: Class-style mixed work where movement economy improves as fatigue rises.
intended_stimulus.zh: 课堂式混合训练，疲劳上升时动作经济性仍要改善。

scaling_path.en: Scale to 3 rounds that finish inside 18-22 minutes.
scaling_path.zh: 调整为能在 18-22 分钟内完成的 3 轮。

scaling_path.en: Choose a pull variation that keeps sets mostly unbroken.
scaling_path.zh: 选择能基本连续完成的拉力动作变化。

notes.en: Do not turn constantly varied into randomly exhausting.
notes.zh: 不要把不断变化做成随机累死。

sunday.title: Easy aerobic base and weekly review

skill_strength.en: No strength work unless it is rehab or mobility
skill_strength.zh: 除康复或活动度外，不做力量训练

metcon.en: Continuous easy walk, jog, bike, row, or mixed aerobic
metcon.zh: 连续轻松步行、慢跑、骑车、划船或混合有氧

cooldown.en: Review: best scale choice, worst limiter, next-week priority
cooldown.zh: 复盘：最佳 Scale 选择、最大短板、下周优先级

intended_stimulus.en: Build base capacity and turn the week into actionable feedback.
intended_stimulus.zh: 建立基础能力，并把本周训练转化为可执行反馈。

scaling_path.en: Split into two walks if fatigue is high.
scaling_path.zh: 疲劳高时拆成两次步行。

notes.en: The review decides next week's accessory work.
notes.zh: 本次复盘决定下周辅助训练方向。

skill_strength.en: 10 min limiter audit from last week
skill_strength.zh: 10 分钟复盘上周短板

metcon.en: Optional zone 1 bike or row
metcon.zh: 可选 1 区骑车或划船

cooldown.zh: 规划本周 Scale 决策

intended_stimulus.en: Recover while identifying the real limiter.
intended_stimulus.zh: 恢复的同时识别真实短板。

scaling_path.en: Rest fully if sleep or soreness is poor.
scaling_path.zh: 睡眠或酸痛差时完全休息。

notes.en: Accessory work must solve a limiter.
notes.zh: 辅助训练必须解决短板。

warmup.zh: 划船 5 分钟，加肩髋准备

skill_strength.en: Front squat 5 x 3 then strict pull or ring-row density
skill_strength.zh: 前蹲 5 组 x 3 次，然后严格拉力或吊环划船密度训练

metcon.en: 12 min EMOM: wall balls, pull variation, double-under or step-over practice
metcon.zh: 12 分钟 EMOM：墙球、拉力变化、双摇或跨步练习

cooldown.zh: 放松前臂、背阔肌、股四头肌

intended_stimulus.en: Controlled strength endurance without gymnastics collapse.
intended_stimulus.zh: 可控力量耐力，不让体操动作崩掉。

scaling_path.en: Scale gymnastics before shoulder position changes.
scaling_path.zh: 肩部位置改变前先 Scale 体操动作。

notes.en: Keep one rep in reserve on skill sets.
notes.zh: 技能组保留 1 次余力。

skill_strength.en: Power clean technique 8 x 2 at crisp load
skill_strength.zh: 高翻技术 8 组 x 2 次，使用清爽重量

metcon.en: 9 min AMRAP: 6 hang power cleans, 9 burpees, 12/10 cal row
metcon.zh: 9 分钟 AMRAP：6 次悬垂高翻、9 次波比、12/10 卡划船

cooldown.en: Walk and note bar path under fatigue
cooldown.zh: 步行并记录疲劳下杠铃路径

intended_stimulus.en: Fast but technically honest barbell cycling.
intended_stimulus.zh: 快速但技术诚实的杠铃循环。

scaling_path.en: Use dumbbells or medicine-ball cleans if receiving position is inconsistent.
scaling_path.zh: 接杠位置不稳定时，改用哑铃或药球翻站。

notes.en: Medicine-ball clean can be the clean-learning entry point.
notes.zh: 药球翻站可作为学习 Clean 的入口。

skill_strength.en: Damper and stroke-rate check
skill_strength.zh: 风阻和桨频检查

metcon.en: 5-8 x 3 min steady-hard / 2 min easy
metcon.zh: 5-8 组：3 分钟稳定偏难 / 2 分钟轻松

cooldown.en: Record split drift and breathing control
cooldown.zh: 记录分段漂移和呼吸控制

intended_stimulus.en: Hard repeatable intervals, not one heroic first rep.
intended_stimulus.zh: 偏难且可重复的间歇，不是一组英雄式开局。

scaling_path.en: Hold splits within 3-5 percent.
scaling_path.zh: 分段控制在 3-5% 内。

notes.en: Stable rhythm saves energy.
notes.zh: 稳定节奏会更省力。

warmup.zh: 针对当前短板做活动度

skill_strength.en: 3-4 focused accessory movements tied to this week's limiter
skill_strength.zh: 3-4 个与本周短板直接相关的辅助动作

metcon.en: Optional 8 min easy flush, no score
metcon.zh: 可选 8 分钟轻松恢复，不计成绩

cooldown.zh: 记录辅助训练是否改变动作位置

intended_stimulus.en: Accessory work should make the next WOD better, not just longer.
intended_stimulus.zh: 辅助训练应让下一次 WOD 更好，而不是单纯更长。

scaling_path.en: Cut volume if it creates soreness for Saturday.
scaling_path.zh: 如果影响周六，减少训练量。

notes.en: Stop ineffective accessory work.
notes.zh: 停止无效辅助训练。

warmup.en: Full class warm-up and movement rehearsal
warmup.zh: 完整课堂热身和动作预演

skill_strength.en: Skill standard review for the highest-skill movement
skill_strength.zh: 复盘最高技能动作的标准

metcon.en: For time, capped 18 min: 21-15-9 thrusters and pull variation, with 300 m run before each round
metcon.zh: 计时，18 分钟封顶：21-15-9 推举深蹲和拉力变化，每轮前跑 300 米

cooldown.en: Walk and record if first round was too hot
cooldown.zh: 步行并记录第一轮是否过快

intended_stimulus.en: Classic couplet pressure with a run buy-in that rewards pacing.
intended_stimulus.zh: 经典组合压力，加跑步门槛，奖励配速能力。

scaling_path.en: Choose load and pull option for 6-10 minute working sets, not failed reps.
scaling_path.zh: 选择能在 6-10 分钟工作段内推进的重量和拉力动作，不要做到失败。

notes.en: Pacing limiter shows up early here.
notes.zh: 节奏短板会在这里很早暴露。

sunday.title: Long easy aerobic and fueling practice

skill_strength.en: No heavy lifting
skill_strength.zh: 不做重训

metcon.en: Easy continuous aerobic with optional carbs if over 60 min
metcon.zh: 连续轻松有氧，超过 60 分钟可练习碳水补给

intended_stimulus.en: Build base and stomach tolerance without adding joint stress.
intended_stimulus.zh: 建立基础和肠胃耐受，不增加关节压力。

scaling_path.en: Use low-impact machine if joints are irritated.
scaling_path.zh: 关节不适时使用低冲击器械。

notes.en: Longer competition prep includes gut training.
notes.zh: 更长比赛准备包含肠胃训练。

skill_strength.en: Review benchmark splits and limiter
skill_strength.zh: 复盘基准分段和短板

metcon.en: No score
metcon.zh: 不计成绩

intended_stimulus.en: Recover and make the next hard day precise.
intended_stimulus.zh: 恢复，并让下一次困难课更精准。

scaling_path.en: Complete rest is valid.
scaling_path.zh: 完全休息也是有效选择。

notes.en: Benchmark data should guide work.
notes.zh: 基准数据指导训练。

skill_strength.en: Skill primer for pull, press, or squat standard
skill_strength.zh: 拉、推或蹲标准技能激活

metcon.en: 3 x 5 min AMRAP at sustainable Open pace / 3 min rest
metcon.zh: 3 组 5 分钟 AMRAP，使用可持续 Open 配速 / 休息 3 分钟

intended_stimulus.en: Repeat Open pressure without making each interval a collapse.
intended_stimulus.zh: 重复 Open 压力，但每组都不能崩掉。

scaling_path.en: Scale to keep round counts within 10 percent.
scaling_path.zh: Scale 到每组轮数差距控制在 10% 内。

notes.en: Stimulus first, Rx second.
notes.zh: 目标刺激第一，Rx 第二。

skill_strength.en: Heavy day: squat, press, deadlift, or clean variation 5 x 2-5
skill_strength.zh: 重训日：深蹲、推举、硬拉或翻站变化 5 组 x 2-5 次

metcon.en: 10 min EMOM low-fatigue skill practice
metcon.zh: 10 分钟 EMOM 低疲劳技能练习

intended_stimulus.en: Increase force production without burying skill quality.
intended_stimulus.zh: 提高发力能力，但不埋掉技能质量。

scaling_path.en: Stop heavy sets when bar speed or receiving position slows sharply.
scaling_path.zh: 杠速或接杠位置明显下降时停止重组。

notes.en: Do not hide strength weakness inside metcons.
notes.zh: 不要把力量短板藏在 MetCon 里。

skill_strength.en: Break strategy practice
skill_strength.zh: 拆组策略练习

metcon.en: For quality, capped 22 min: row, box step-over, dumbbell snatch, sit-up, carry
metcon.zh: 高质量完成，22 分钟封顶：划船、箱上跨步、哑铃抓举、仰卧起坐、负重行走

cooldown.zh: 记录哪个环节节奏开始变贵

intended_stimulus.en: Longer mixed-modal pacing where economy matters more than early speed.
intended_stimulus.zh: 较长混合模式配速，动作经济性比早期速度更重要。

scaling_path.en: Scale reps to finish with steady movement instead of long stops.
scaling_path.zh: 调整次数，确保稳定移动而不是长时间停顿。

notes.en: Steady rhythm saves energy.
notes.zh: 稳定节奏省力。

skill_strength.en: Optional mobility only
skill_strength.zh: 只做可选活动度

metcon.en: No conditioning
metcon.zh: 不做体能刺激

intended_stimulus.en: Absorb the week.
intended_stimulus.zh: 吸收本周训练。

scaling_path.en: Rest is the scale.
scaling_path.zh: 休息就是 Scale。

notes.en: Protect Saturday quality.
notes.zh: 保护周六质量。

skill_strength.en: Skill or strength touch, not max effort
skill_strength.zh: 技能或力量触碰，不做最大努力

metcon.en: Class-style WOD with a clear score and a planned scale option
metcon.zh: 课堂式 WOD，有明确成绩和预设 Scale 选项

cooldown.en: Score, scale, limiter, and pacing review

intended_stimulus.en: Practice the full CrossFit class arc under fatigue.
intended_stimulus.zh: 在疲劳下练习完整 CrossFit 课堂弧线。

scaling_path.en: Choose the scale before the clock starts.
scaling_path.zh: 计时开始前先选好 Scale。

notes.en: A WOD needs a reason, not just sweat.
notes.zh: WOD 需要理由，不只是流汗。

skill_strength.en: Mobility for the week's tightest positions
skill_strength.zh: 针对本周最紧的位置做活动度

metcon.en: Continuous zone 2
metcon.zh: 连续 2 区有氧

intended_stimulus.en: Restore and build base.
intended_stimulus.zh: 恢复并建立基础。

scaling_path.en: Low impact when joints complain.
scaling_path.zh: 关节不适时低冲击。

notes.en: Keep the next week possible.
notes.zh: 让下周还能继续。

skill_strength.en: Select one benchmark and one limiter metric
skill_strength.zh: 选择一个基准和一个短板指标

metcon.en: No score
metcon.zh: 不计成绩

intended_stimulus.en: Arrive fresh enough to measure progress.
intended_stimulus.zh: 以足够清爽的状态衡量进步。

scaling_path.en: Do less than you want.
scaling_path.zh: 做得比你想做的少。

notes.en: Testing is not training volume.
notes.zh: 测试不是训练量。

skill_strength.en: 2-3 light sets of benchmark movements
skill_strength.zh: 基准动作轻重量 2-3 组

metcon.en: 3 short rounds at planned pace, stop fresh
metcon.zh: 按计划配速做 3 个短轮，清爽停止

cooldown.zh: 确认 Scale 和目标分段

intended_stimulus.en: Sharpen without fatigue.
intended_stimulus.zh: 激活但不疲劳。

scaling_path.en: No failed reps today.
scaling_path.zh: 今天不出现失败动作。

notes.en: Primer is practice, not proof.
notes.zh: 激活课是练习，不是证明。

skill_strength.en: Light positional work for the benchmark standard
skill_strength.zh: 针对基准标准做轻位置练习

metcon.en: Optional 6 min easy flow
metcon.zh: 可选 6 分钟轻松流动

intended_stimulus.en: Feel sharp and technically certain.
intended_stimulus.zh: 感觉敏锐且技术确定。

scaling_path.en: Keep all work easy.
scaling_path.zh: 所有训练保持轻松。

notes.en: Standards decide the score.
notes.zh: 标准决定成绩。

skill_strength.en: Breathing and cadence check
skill_strength.zh: 呼吸和节奏检查

metcon.en: 6 x 45 sec at target pace / 75 sec easy
metcon.zh: 6 组：45 秒目标配速 / 75 秒轻松

intended_stimulus.en: Keep the engine awake.
intended_stimulus.zh: 保持心肺醒着。

scaling_path.en: Stop if legs feel heavy.
scaling_path.zh: 腿沉就停止。

notes.en: No hero intervals.
notes.zh: 不做英雄式间歇。

skill_strength.en: Equipment, warm-up, and scorecard check
skill_strength.zh: 检查器械、热身和成绩记录

metcon.en: No workout
metcon.zh: 不训练

intended_stimulus.en: Reduce noise before test day.
intended_stimulus.zh: 测试日前减少干扰。

scaling_path.en: Rest.
scaling_path.zh: 休息。

notes.en: Fuel normally.
notes.zh: 正常补给。

skill_strength.en: Standards rehearsal only
skill_strength.zh: 只复习动作标准

metcon.en: One selected benchmark or Open-style workout
metcon.zh: 一个选定基准或 Open 风格训练

cooldown.en: Record score, scale, splits, and limiter

intended_stimulus.en: Measure progress honestly.
intended_stimulus.zh: 诚实衡量进步。

scaling_path.en: Use the pre-selected scale; do not improvise heavier mid-workout.
scaling_path.zh: 使用预选 Scale；不要训练中临时加重。

notes.en: Testing should create feedback.
notes.zh: 测试应产出反馈。

skill_strength.en: Mobility only
skill_strength.zh: 只做活动度

metcon.en: Optional easy flush
metcon.zh: 可选轻松恢复

intended_stimulus.en: Recover and convert the test into next-cycle priorities.
intended_stimulus.zh: 恢复，并把测试转化为下个周期优先级。

scaling_path.en: Rest if emotionally or physically drained.
scaling_path.zh: 身心都累时休息。

notes.en: The next plan starts from evidence.
notes.zh: 下个计划从证据开始。
